body: Hi, I was charged twice for the November plan — order #88213 shows two identical $49 line items. Could you refund the duplicate? Not urgent, but I'd like it sorted before the next cycle.
the export button does nothing. clicked it maybe ten times. no download, no error, nothing in the console. this is blocking my monday report.
Our entire team has been locked out since the 3am deploy. SSO redirects to a blank page and then times out. We have 40 people idle and a customer demo at noon. Please escalate.
Quick question — is there a way to change the timezone on scheduled reports? I couldn't find it in settings. No rush at all, just curious.
cancel my subscription. i've asked twice already and i'm still being billed. want a full refund for the last two months.
The CSV import silently drops rows that have a comma inside a quoted field. About 12% of my file went missing and there was no warning. Happy to send a sample file if useful.
